tasks.subject: Task 1: Migration + sqlc queries (schema foundation)

**Goal:** Create user_group/group_member/oidc_client_access/saml_sp_access tables + access_restricted columns; rbac.sql queries (CRUD, predicate, exposed slugs); regenerate sqlc.

```json:metadata
{"files":["db/migrations/015_rbac.sql","db/queries/rbac.sql","db/queries/oidc.sql","db/queries/saml_sp.sql","pkg/db"],"verifyCommand":"mise db:up && mise exec -- sqlc generate && go build ./...","acceptanceCriteria":["015 applies cleanly; existing apps stay open","sqlc generates predicate + CRUD + access_restricted on views","go build/vet clean"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Groups admin API (CRUD + membership)

```json:metadata
{"files":["pkg/server/handle_admin_groups.go","pkg/contract/auth.go","pkg/server/server.go","pkg/audit/event.go","pkg/server/handle_admin_groups_test.go"],"verifyCommand":"go test ./pkg/server/ -run \"Group|Sudo|RoutePolicy\" -v","acceptanceCriteria":["GET /groups lists with member counts","mutations admin+sudo, GETs admin-only","bad slug 400; dup slug conflict","audit on CRUD+membership"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 7: Enforcement (OIDC authorize+refresh, SAML SSO) + denied UX
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Gate issuance on predicate; deny interactive via IdP /error, prompt=none via access_denied, SAML passive via RequestDenied; refresh re-check revokes family; audit EventAccessDenied; ErrorView app_access_denied.

```json:metadata
{"files":["pkg/protocol/oidc/access.go","pkg/protocol/oidc/authorize.go","pkg/protocol/oidc/token.go","pkg/protocol/oidc/refresh.go","pkg/protocol/saml/sso.go","dashboard/src/pages/ErrorView.vue","dashboard/src/locales/en.ts","pkg/protocol/oidc/authorize_test.go","pkg/protocol/saml/sso_test.go"],"verifyCommand":"go test ./pkg/protocol/...","acceptanceCriteria":["restricted+non-member denied (interactive /error; prompt=none access_denied)","refresh re-check -> invalid_grant + family revoked","SAML passive -> RequestDenied; interactive -> /error","denials audited"]}
```

